items.name: Panel
items.doc: A resizable panel with a normalized ratio and min/max constraints.

items.name: new
items.signature: pub fn new(id: impl Into<String>, ratio: f32) -> Self

items.name: with_constraint
items.signature: pub fn with_constraint(mut self, min: f32, max: f32) -> Self

items.name: drag
items.signature: pub fn drag(panels: &mut [Panel], handle_idx: usize, delta: f32) -> f32
items.doc:
Apply a drag delta to the handle between panels[handle_idx] and panels[handle_idx + 1].

`delta` is a signed ratio fraction: positive = handle moves right/down.
Both neighbors update; sum of all ratios stays at 1.0.

Returns the actual transfer applied (may be smaller than `delta` due to constraints).

items.name: normalize
items.doc:
Normalize panel ratios so they sum to exactly 1.0.
Call this after constructing panels to ensure invariant holds.

items.name: check_sum
items.doc: Verify that panel ratios sum to approximately 1.0.
